positive: A mesmerizing, stylized silhouette illustration of a cosmic nebula cradling a whimsical hot air balloon and scattered constellations. The scene features deep indigos, vibrant teals, burnt oranges, and touches of celestial gold. The hot air balloon is subtly detailed with botanical patterns, floating among stylized rings of Saturn-like rings and glowing stardust. Composition is highly centralized and balanced, emphasizing clean, flowing lines and strong contrast between the silhouettes and the glowing cosmic background. Mid-century modern illustration style meets ethereal astronomical art. Perfect for a seamless, repeating apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, low detail, dirty, noise, out of frame, grainy
